revisedPrompt:
Create exactly one PNG image for a game-development pixel-art asset.

Asset contract:
- Profile: snes16_platformer_v1
- Preset: field_prop_32
- Asset kind/type: field-prop / prop
- Exact sheet size: 32x32 px
- Grid: 1 row x 1 column
- Frame size: 32x32 px, one frame only
- Background: solid #FF00FF chroma key filling all empty space, no transparency, no gradients
- Style: crisp 16-bit SNES-style pixel art, low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source

Subject:
ONE Japanese wooden trail signpost as a single field object, front view. It should look like a small kosatsu-style roofed notice board on a dark wooden post: weathered planks, small roof cap, tiny vermilion cord accent, soft contact shadow. No letters, no text, no symbols.

Palette and mood:
Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette with deep rich saturated greens, subtle clear blue-green water-colored accents, vermilion and white accents, soft warm sunlight. Cheerful and readable. NOT dry, NOT yellow-brown, NOT western prairie, NOT wasteland.

Composition and cleanliness:
- Keep the entire object inside the 32x32 frame with clear solid magenta margin on every edge.
- Single coherent object with clear collision footprint.
- No cell separator lines, grid lines, frame borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, or watermarks.
- No detached fragments, isolated pixel islands, dust specks, slivers, residue, floating particles, or extra props.

Avoid all protected or unrelated content:
No Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, or emblems. No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letters, text, watermark, or UI.

Final image must be a single 32x32 pixel-art sprite sheet PNG with only the signpost object and solid #FF00FF empty background.
